name: 天照灼烧结算
description: 每回合结束时，对当前结束回合的玩家旗下所有有天照灼烧效果的棋子造成每层2点伤害
skillCode: var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var amaterasuOwnerPlayerId = (battle.extensions && battle.extensions.amaterasuOwnerPlayerId) || null; var msgs = []; battle.pieces.forEach(function(p) { if (p.currentHp <= 0 || p.ownerPlayerId !== currentPlayerId) return; var tag = p.statusTags && p.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'amaterasu-burn'; }); if (!tag) return; var stacks = tag.stacks || 1; var dmg = 2 * stacks; dealDamage(p, p, dmg, 'true', battle, 'amaterasu-burn-tick', false, amaterasuOwnerPlayerId); msgs.push(p.name + '受天照灼烧(' + stacks + '层)，失去' + dmg + '点生命值'); }); if (msgs.length === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; return { success: true, message: msgs.join('；') };
